name: entries_list
description: List content entries for a specific collection type in Strapi. Supports filtering by field values, sorting, pagination, field selection, and population of relations and components. The content type is specified as a pluralized API ID in the URL path (e.g., 'articles', 'products'). Strapi 5 uses bracket notation for complex query parameters.

parameters.name: pluralApiId
parameters.description: The pluralized API ID of the collection type (e.g., 'articles', 'products', 'categories').

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Filter entries using bracket notation: filters[field][$operator]=value. Operators: $eq, $ne, $lt, $gt, $lte, $gte, $in, $contains, $startsWith, $endsWith, $null, $notNull.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort by field and direction. Format: 'field:asc' or 'field:desc'. Multiple: 'sort[0]=field1:asc&sort[1]=field2:desc'.

parameters.name: pagination[pageSize]
parameters.description: Entries per page. Maximum 100. Defaults to 25.

parameters.name: populate
parameters.description: Relations/components to populate. Use '*' for all first-level, or 'populate[0]=author&populate[1]=categories' for specific fields.
